description: The LegacyButton component is a leftover Component from content migrated from other platforms. It should not be used, and should be replaced whenever possible.

fields.Slant: How much Bevel the button should have.
fields.Pressed: The Sync delegate to call when this button is pressed.
fields.Pressing: The Sync delegate to call per engine update as this button is being held down.
fields.Released: The Sync delegate to call when this button has stopped being pressed.
fields.IsPressed: Whether the button is being pressed currently.
fields.AcceptOutOfSightTouch: Whether this button accepts interaction if the user isn't looking at it.
fields._textSlot: The slot of the text visual for this button.
fields._textRenderer: The text renderer for this button.
fields._buttonPosition: The position field for this button for physical pressing.
fields._colliderSize: The collider size field for this button's collider.
fields._colliderOffset: The collider offset field for this button's collider.
fields._textPosition: The text position field for this button's text
fields._textBounds: The 2d bounds of this button's text
fields._holderMesh: The mesh that is containing this button (like a parent UI.
fields._buttonMesh: The Bevel mesh that makes up this button's visual.
fields._holderMaterial: The material of the parent UI mesh.
fields._buttonMaterial: The material of this button's mesh visual
fields._pressDepth: How far the user is currently pressing the button physically
fields._flashIndex: How much to add to the emission of the holder material.
